dataset_reference.description: Replace this template with a real/anonymized VesselFlow dataset reference before using --write.

qualification_rules: PVQ/Q88 must have required fields available or explicitly marked missing.
Certificates/documents must be present and validity must be checkable.
Contract constraints must not conflict with vessel/platform/cargo requirements.
Human review is required before any external use.
known_blocking_rules: Do not create client-facing claim without human approval.
Do not authorize implementation or production activation from intake data.
Block when required evidence is missing.
human_notes: Fill this file, then run prepare_vesselflow_real_data_intake.py with --write only after reviewing the data classification.
